title: Neighbourhood Policing Guarantee performance framework
body: "As part of the Safer Streets Mission, the government has committed to transforming neighbourhood policing over the course of this Parliament.  The Neighbourhood Policing Guarantee sets out what communities can expect from their neighbourhood policing teams.  We are committed to monitoring and evaluating the delivery of the Neighbourhood Policing Guarantee and have worked collaboratively with policing to agree a full performance framework for the Guarantee and its 5 pillars.   We are aware this publication may have accessibility issues. We are reviewing it so that we can fix these. Read more about our accessible documents policy.  "
